channel.title: Stolen-Certificate on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Stolen-Certificate on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Signed malware impersonating workplace apps deploys RMM backdoors
item.description:
Microsoft reports malware signed with a stolen EV certificate that masquerades as workplace apps and installs legitimate remote monitoring and management (RMM) tools to maintain persistent enterprise access.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
